name: real-estate-broker
description: Real estate broker toolkit for coWork CRM and WhatsApp (WaSender). Manage listings, leads, viewings, follow-ups, and send property selections to clients — all from Claude Code.

cowork_base_url.description: Your coWork CRM instance URL (e.g. https://yourcompany.cowork.io)

cowork_api_key.description: Your coWork CRM API key (Settings > API in your coWork dashboard)

wasender_api_key.description: Your WaSender API key (from wasenderapi.com dashboard)
